description: End-to-end integration tests exercising the full pipeline: CLI analyze/consensus, API /api/analyze, and error propagation when yfinance is unavailable. Validates the complete data flow from input to consensus output structure.
steps: Test 1: Full pipeline via registry - AgentRegistry -> analyze_with_all -> get_consensus. Verify consensus response has all required fields: signal (bullish/neutral/bearish), score (0-10), confidence (0-1), reasoning, key_findings, risks, metadata.position_sizing
Test 2: CLI analyze command via Click CliRunner - invoke 'analyze AAPL --pe 32 --roe 0.15 --gross-margins 0.46 --json'. Validate JSON output structure and all 18 agents present
Test 3: CLI consensus command via Click CliRunner - invoke 'consensus AAPL --pe 32 --roe 0.15 --gross-margins 0.46 --json'. Validate consensus JSON has signal/score/confidence/individual results

Test 4: API /api/analyze/{ticker} via FastAPI TestClient with manual metrics. Validate full response structure: ticker, timestamp, data_source, consensus (with position_sizing), agents array, agent_count
Test 5: Dashboard /api/analyze/{ticker} endpoint (dashboard/app.py) via TestClient. Same validation as Test 4 but from dashboard app context
Test 6: Error propagation - mock yfinance import to raise ImportError, call API with auto_fetch=True, verify graceful fallback to empty MarketContext and data_source='fallback'
Test 7: All agents ERROR case - mock all agents to return SignalType.ERROR, verify consensus handles gracefully (no division by zero, returns neutral signal)
Test 8: Verify score clamping - create extreme MarketContext values and verify consensus.score is always in [0, 10] range
Test 9: Verify Kelly position sizing in consensus metadata - bullish signal should have position_pct > 0, bearish should have position_pct = 0
Test 10: Data type consistency - verify all AgentResponse fields have correct types (signal is SignalType enum, score is float, confidence is float 0-1)
acceptance_criteria: All 10 new tests pass with `python -m pytest tests/test_e2e_pipeline.py -v`
Tests exercise real code paths (not just mocking everything away)
Tests validate actual output structures match documented format
findings: All 10 E2E tests pass. Full suite 211 tests green. For Test 6 (yfinance fallback), the correct patch target is augur.data.fetch_market_context since dashboard/app.py uses a local import inside the endpoint function. One transient test ordering issue with test_dashboard_errors.py::test_path_traversal_ticker was observed once but is not reproducible.
